title: Sam Steele and the Crystal Chalice
original_title: Sam Steele and the Crystal Chalice
overview: When Sam Steele Junior gets a term paper assignment on a visit by the Soviet Premier to the Midwest in the late 1950s he's less than enthused. But when he learns it may lead to treasure, the Junior Detective Agency is on the adventure of a lifetime.
